title: Orison Agent Changed Symbols v1
description: Per-symbol incremental change report emitted by `ori agent changed`. Each run compares the parsed symbol fingerprints under <path> against the previously persisted table (default: <path>/.ori/fingerprints.json or the file passed via --prev) and reports added, modified, removed, and one-hop-invalidated downstream modules. Fingerprints are FNV-1a over (id, kind, normalized signature, sorted effects).

added.description: Sorted list of canonical symbol ids that are present in the current run but were absent from the previous fingerprint table.

modified.description: Sorted list of canonical symbol ids whose fingerprint differs from the previous run. A signature or effect-set change shows up here; renames look like one removed id plus one added id.

removed.description: Sorted list of canonical symbol ids that were in the previous fingerprint table but are no longer produced by the current run.

dependents.description: Sorted list of module names that import a module containing at least one added or modified symbol. One-hop propagation only; see the query engine docs for the multi-hop roadmap.

notes.description: Human-readable, non-fatal notes recorded during this run. The CLI surfaces missing or unreadable previous-fingerprint files here rather than failing.

notes: previous fingerprints file `examples/demo_store/src/.ori/fingerprints.json` was unreadable (No such file or directory (os error 2)); treating all symbols as new
